name: The All-on-X Candidate
context: 50–70, multiple failing or missing teeth. Has done enough research to know All-on-4 exists — may have watched YouTube videos or gotten a quote elsewhere. High intent but possibly sticker-shocked. Wants to know if they can leave with teeth the same day, whether their bone situation qualifies them, and what the difference is between All-on-4 and All-on-6. Same-day temporaries, a clear 3-step process, prosthodontist-designed framing, and financing options convert them.
